markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Define HX's competitive positioning for a new content series.](https://fathom.video/share/skgszgHS88wXxxBV6x9qG9m49714r1bt?tab=summary&timestamp=169.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Content Strategy:** Launch two new streams—"alternative" articles and "tool roundups"—to capture high-intent organic search traffic.](https://fathom.video/share/skgszgHS88wXxxBV6x9qG9m49714r1bt?tab=summary&timestamp=169.0)
  - [**Phased Rollout:** Prioritize content on "Legacy Providers" and "Pricing Platforms" first, as HX's positioning is strongest and most consistent there.](https://fathom.video/share/skgszgHS88wXxxBV6x9qG9m49714r1bt?tab=summary&timestamp=405.0)
  - [**Deferred Content:** Pause articles on "Underwriting Workbenches" and "Submission Triage" until HX's strategy and product capabilities are more defined.](https://fathom.video/share/skgszgHS88wXxxBV6x9qG9m49714r1bt?tab=summary&timestamp=1248.0)
  - [**Content Goal:** Focus on SEO and lead generation, not sales-call-level narrative. Content will be treated as "living documents" to be refined over time.](https://fathom.video/share/skgszgHS88wXxxBV6x9qG9m49714r1bt?tab=summary&timestamp=519.0)

## Topics

### Content Strategy & Goals

  - [**Objective:** Capture high-intent organic search traffic with two new content streams:](https://fathom.video/share/skgszgHS88wXxxBV6x9qG9m49714r1bt?tab=summary&timestamp=169.0)
      - [**Alternative Articles:** Deep dives comparing HX to specific competitors.](https://fathom.video/share/skgszgHS88wXxxBV6x9qG9m49714r1bt?tab=summary&timestamp=169.0)
      - [**Tool Roundups:** Keyword-driven lists of top software in a category.](https://fathom.video/share/skgszgHS88wXxxBV6x9qG9m49714r1bt?tab=summary&timestamp=199.0)
  - [**SEO-First Approach:** The primary goal is lead generation. Content will be treated as "living documents" to be refined over time, not as final sales narratives.](https://fathom.video/share/skgszgHS88wXxxBV6x9qG9m49714r1bt?tab=summary&timestamp=519.0)
  - [**Content Creation:** GrowthX will conduct independent research, then layer on HX's unique perspective to create differentiated content.](https://fathom.video/share/skgszgHS88wXxxBV6x9qG9m49714r1bt?tab=summary&timestamp=589.0)

### Phased Content Rollout

  - [**Rationale:** Prioritize content where HX's positioning is strongest and most consistent to ensure a solid foundation.](https://fathom.video/share/skgszgHS88wXxxBV6x9qG9m49714r1bt?tab=summary&timestamp=405.0)
  - [**Phase 1 (Immediate):**](https://fathom.video/share/skgszgHS88wXxxBV6x9qG9m49714r1bt?tab=summary&timestamp=706.0)
      - [**Legacy Providers:** Willis-Towers-Watson Radar, Aon Tyke, Excel.](https://fathom.video/share/skgszgHS88wXxxBV6x9qG9m49714r1bt?tab=summary&timestamp=746.0)
      - [**Pricing Platforms:** Eurnix.](https://fathom.video/share/skgszgHS88wXxxBV6x9qG9m49714r1bt?tab=summary&timestamp=1031.0)
      - [**Spreadsheet Converters:** Optometics.](https://fathom.video/share/skgszgHS88wXxxBV6x9qG9m49714r1bt?tab=summary&timestamp=1620.0)
  - [**Phase 2 (Deferred):**](https://fathom.video/share/skgszgHS88wXxxBV6x9qG9m49714r1bt?tab=summary&timestamp=1248.0)
      - [**Underwriting Workbenches:** Federato.](https://fathom.video/share/skgszgHS88wXxxBV6x9qG9m49714r1bt?tab=summary&timestamp=1248.0)
      - [**Submission Triage:** Point solutions.](https://fathom.video/share/skgszgHS88wXxxBV6x9qG9m49714r1bt?tab=summary&timestamp=1613.0)

### Phase 1: Legacy Providers (WTW Radar, Aon Tyke, Excel)

  - [**Problem:** Users of these tools are a key ICP due to universal negative sentiment.](https://fathom.video/share/skgszgHS88wXxxBV6x9qG9m49714r1bt?tab=summary&timestamp=794.0)
  - [**HX Differentiators:**](https://fathom.video/share/skgszgHS88wXxxBV6x9qG9m49714r1bt?tab=summary&timestamp=892.0)
      - [**User Experience:** Superior UI/UX vs. legacy platforms.](https://fathom.video/share/skgszgHS88wXxxBV6x9qG9m49714r1bt?tab=summary&timestamp=794.0)
      - [**Performance:** Fast, flexible, and non-brittle platform.](https://fathom.video/share/skgszgHS88wXxxBV6x9qG9m49714r1bt?tab=summary&timestamp=943.0)
      - [**Business Model:** No vendor lock-in or hidden consultancy fees for changes.](https://fathom.video/share/skgszgHS88wXxxBV6x9qG9m49714r1bt?tab=summary&timestamp=960.0)
      - [**Technology:** Native Python for model building vs. proprietary languages.](https://fathom.video/share/skgszgHS88wXxxBV6x9qG9m49714r1bt?tab=summary&timestamp=997.0)
      - [**Underwriter UI:** Custom interfaces for high-touch underwriting.](https://fathom.video/share/skgszgHS88wXxxBV6x9qG9m49714r1bt?tab=summary&timestamp=892.0)

### Phase 1: Pricing Platforms (Eurnix)

  - [**Problem:** Eurnix is built for personal lines (high volume, simple risk), not complex commercial risk.](https://fathom.video/share/skgszgHS88wXxxBV6x9qG9m49714r1bt?tab=summary&timestamp=1038.0)
  - [**HX Differentiators:**](https://fathom.video/share/skgszgHS88wXxxBV6x9qG9m49714r1bt?tab=summary&timestamp=892.0)
      - [**Market Focus:** Built for complex commercial risk (P\&C, specialty).](https://fathom.video/share/skgszgHS88wXxxBV6x9qG9m49714r1bt?tab=summary&timestamp=1080.0)
      - [**Technology:** Pro-code Python for building complex raters.](https://fathom.video/share/skgszgHS88wXxxBV6x9qG9m49714r1bt?tab=summary&timestamp=1080.0)
      - [**Underwriter UI:** Custom interfaces for high-touch underwriting.](https://fathom.video/share/skgszgHS88wXxxBV6x9qG9m49714r1bt?tab=summary&timestamp=892.0)
  - [**Angle:** Position HX as the superior choice for complex risk, with Eurnix as a viable alternative for personal lines.](https://fathom.video/share/skgszgHS88wXxxBV6x9qG9m49714r1bt?tab=summary&timestamp=1031.0)

### Phase 1: Spreadsheet Converters (Optometics)

  - [**Problem:** These tools are a short-term fix that don't solve the core problem of scalability and data capture.](https://fathom.video/share/skgszgHS88wXxxBV6x9qG9m49714r1bt?tab=summary&timestamp=1673.0)
  - [**HX Differentiator:**](https://fathom.video/share/skgszgHS88wXxxBV6x9qG9m49714r1bt?tab=summary&timestamp=1673.0)
      - [**Transformation:** Enables a full pricing transformation, not just a model conversion.](https://fathom.video/share/skgszgHS88wXxxBV6x9qG9m49714r1bt?tab=summary&timestamp=1673.0)
      - [**Scalability:** Provides a scalable, data-capturing platform.](https://fathom.video/share/skgszgHS88wXxxBV6x9qG9m49714r1bt?tab=summary&timestamp=1673.0)

### Phase 2: Deferred Content

  - [**Underwriting Workbenches (Federato):**](https://fathom.video/share/skgszgHS88wXxxBV6x9qG9m49714r1bt?tab=summary&timestamp=1248.0)
      - [**Reason for Deferral:** HX's strategy and messaging are evolving with the website relaunch. A clear, confident narrative is needed for public comparison articles.](https://fathom.video/share/skgszgHS88wXxxBV6x9qG9m49714r1bt?tab=summary&timestamp=1268.0)
  - [**Submission Triage:**](https://fathom.video/share/skgszgHS88wXxxBV6x9qG9m49714r1bt?tab=summary&timestamp=1613.0)
      - [**Reason for Deferral:** HX's triage solution is still in development; the current feature set is not competitive enough for a comparison article.](https://fathom.video/share/skgszgHS88wXxxBV6x9qG9m49714r1bt?tab=summary&timestamp=1637.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**GrowthX:**](https://fathom.video/share/skgszgHS88wXxxBV6x9qG9m49714r1bt?tab=summary&timestamp=1699.0)
      - [Create 1–2 example articles (e.g., HX vs. WTW Radar, HX vs. Eurnix) for review.](https://fathom.video/share/skgszgHS88wXxxBV6x9qG9m49714r1bt?tab=summary&timestamp=1699.0)
      - [Revise the full content list based on the phased rollout plan.](https://fathom.video/share/skgszgHS88wXxxBV6x9qG9m49714r1bt?tab=summary&timestamp=1744.0)
      - [Schedule a follow-up meeting to discuss deferred topics.](https://fathom.video/share/skgszgHS88wXxxBV6x9qG9m49714r1bt?tab=summary&timestamp=1381.0)
  - [**Hyperexponential Team:**](https://fathom.video/share/skgszgHS88wXxxBV6x9qG9m49714r1bt?tab=summary&timestamp=1770.0)
      - [Compile links to relevant internal and external content (blog posts, battle cards).](https://fathom.video/share/skgszgHS88wXxxBV6x9qG9m49714r1bt?tab=summary&timestamp=1770.0)
      - [Prepare battle cards for public use by removing sensitive internal information.](https://fathom.video/share/skgszgHS88wXxxBV6x9qG9m49714r1bt?tab=summary&timestamp=1792.0)
